name: Governor Scott Walker
subject: I know you care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
| | ****[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjIzODcyOTAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQwOTI2MTgyS0&mt=2&rj=NTQwOTA3NjY4S0&rt=0) Peter,

I know that you care about America as much as I do. Over the last 6 years we have seen the leaders of our country make one bad decision after another. This has caused record unemployment, soaring deficits, high energy and food costs, and unstable relationships with some of our strongest allies.

To you and me this is unacceptable. We both know that we can do so much better. [I hope that you will stand with me as we fight to restore American greatness.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjIzODcyOTAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQwOTI2MTgyS0&mt=2&rj=NTQwOTA3NjY4S0&rt=0)

**Together, we can have Our American Revival.** [A contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $5 will go a long way in our fight. ](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjIzODcyOTAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQwOTI2MTgyS0&mt=2&rj=NTQwOTA3NjY4S0&rt=0)

[**Can I count on you?**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIzODcyOTAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQwOTI2MTgyS0&mt=2&rj=NTQwOTA3NjY4S0&rt=0)

Thanks for all you do,

Governor Scott Walker **
** [](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjIzODcyOTAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQwOTI2MTgyS0&mt=2&rj=NTQwOTA3NjY4S0&rt=0)
